ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "x" REAL /* x coordinate of participant movement */,
  "y" REAL /* y coordinate of participant movement */,
  "xt" REAL /* x coordinate of participant movement over time */,
  "yt" REAL /* y coordinate of participant movement over time */,
  "cat" INTEGER /* Category of the trial */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  "sub_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-task */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_sub_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_task_id") REFERENCES sub_tasks ("sub_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the trial type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_tasks" (
  "sub_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-task */,
  "sub_task_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the sub-task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the message is related to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
